# Susan Kare — original bitmap sketches + early Mac icon design

**Clawmachine-fit rating:** S

**Notes:** Root of aesthetic. Hand-drawn 32x32 gridded paper sketches. Operator's Chicago font + icon set literally descend from here.

**Credits / sources:** Susan Kare / kareprints.com, MoMA collection, Smithsonian Invention & Innovation, It's Nice That, The New Yorker, 99% Invisible.

**Use:** internal non-commercial fair-use design reference only. Do not redistribute.
